programme.title: E202 - A Pinata For Mami / Invisi-Swiper
programme.desc: Dora's family makes a pinata for Mami's birthday, but it flies away! They have to get it back safe before Mami arrives. / Swiper swipes an invisibility blanket! Now Invisi-Swiper is swiping everything, and it's up to Dora and Boots to stop him.

programme.title: E105 - Moon Cow
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner.

programme.title: E112 - Bicycles
programme.desc: Daddy Pig has grown a huge pumpkin and Peppa is riding her bike, but says she wants to ride without training wheels. But soon she crashes into the pumpkin.

programme.title: E710 - Simple Science
programme.desc: While the playground is getting rebuilt, Daddy Pig teaches the children some Simple Science!

programme.title: E104 - Making Bread / From One Pit To Another
programme.desc: Barbapapa wants to teach his children to make bread, but things don't go as planned... // The Barbababies plant an avocado tree. However, it takes years before the first harvest. Barbabright has an idea to save time that may well lead to...disaster.

programme.title: E316 - Puptown Funk
programme.desc: When the Sharkpack attempts to take the sharkpups out, they keep going into Sharkmode and no one can figure out why.

programme.title: E317 - Pup, Pup And Away
programme.desc: Megamouth gets loose in Foggy Springs and Max and Sharkdog need to find her before she gets hurt!

programme.title: E309 - Pups Save A Dragon / Pups Save Three Little Pigs
programme.desc: A fantasy fire breathing dragon comes to life and won't let Ryder and pups into the Lookout! Paw Patrol takes to the Air Patroller! // The Paw Patrol help three little pigs build new houses after theirs mysteriously disappear.

programme.title: E245 - Captain Daddy Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family borrow Grandpa Pig's boat for a day on the river. Daddy Pig is the captain, Peppa, George and Mummy Pig are the crew. When the boat gets stuck in some long reeds. Daddy Pig has to use all his strength to push the boat free.

programme.title: E216 - Going With The Flow
programme.desc: The Barbababies are bored, the rain is preventing them from playing outside.

programme.title: E223 - Buttercup / We Need To Save The Corals
programme.desc: Barbidou's beautiful roses mysteriously disappeared during the night. // Barbapapa decides to tell the barbababies about the time he went to explore the Arctic and the seabed.

programme.title: E105 - Moon Cow
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner.

programme.title: E902 - Pit Crew Power
programme.desc: Blaze is racing in the Pit Stop Power Race with AJ and Gabby as his pit crew! But Crusher is also in the race, and with his Pickle Pit Crew he's determined to win. Will Blaze take home the trophy, or will Crusher pit-stop Blaze in his tracks?

programme.title: E220 - The Barbababies Have Got Talent / Triple Switcheroo
programme.desc: Every barbababy is invited to show their greatest talent on stage. // Video games are fun, but you also need to know how to enjoy the nice weather!

programme.title: E108 - The Crew Builds A Popcorn Cafe / The Crew Fixes A Slippery Mess
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew switch to cleanup mode when construction on Cafe Carl's new popcorn restaurant pops out of control. // A soapy accident causes slippery mayhem all over Builder Cove. Can the pups clean it up in time for Mayor Greatway's big jump?

programme.title: E1302 - Pups Save Teatime
programme.desc: Mayor Goodway invites her friend Helga Humdinger, and her rival Mayor Humdinger, to City Hall for afternoon tea.

programme.title: E1302 - Pups Save The Orienteers
programme.desc: Things go wrong for Mr. Porter and Winnie Winnington at the orienteering relay in Yellowbone National Park.

programme.title: E714 - Mummy Pig's Book
programme.desc: Mummy Pig has finally finished writing her first book and decides to take it to playgroup to read to the children with unexpected results.

programme.title: E715 - The Zoo
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle takes the children on a trip to the Zoo where they get a tour from the zookeepers; Mr Lion, Mrs Crocodile and Mr Giraffe!

programme.title: E319 - Return To The Island
programme.desc: The Sharkpack need to get the sharkpups back to their rightful home, but will Sharkdog be able to say goodbye?

programme.title: E1302 - Pups Save Teatime
programme.desc: Mayor Goodway invites her friend Helga Humdinger, and her rival Mayor Humdinger, to City Hall for afternoon tea.

programme.title: E1302 - Pups Save The Orienteers
programme.desc: Things go wrong for Mr. Porter and Winnie Winnington at the orienteering relay in Yellowbone National Park.

programme.title: E312 - Pups Save A School Bus / Pups Save The Songbirds
programme.desc: When all the tires on the Adventure Bay school bus blow out, Ryder volunteers to use the Paw Patroller as a substitute school bus. // When the famous singing songbirds of Adventure Bay go missing, it's PAW Patrol to the rescue!

programme.title: E205 - Ah! My Beautiful Castle / The Sand Is Running Away
programme.desc: During a bike ride, the Barbapapa family discovers an old medieval castle in ruins. // Barbapapa and Lolita were traveling in a balloon, but caught in a storm they ended up stranded on a deserted island.

programme.title: E809 - Funny Music
programme.desc: Daddy Pig has a new synthesiser. Peppa, George and Mummy Pig have fun finding and sampling different sounds from around the house!

programme.title: E1302 - Pups Save Teatime
programme.desc: Mayor Goodway invites her friend Helga Humdinger, and her rival Mayor Humdinger, to City Hall for afternoon tea.

programme.title: E1302 - Pups Save The Orienteers
programme.desc: Things go wrong for Mr. Porter and Winnie Winnington at the orienteering relay in Yellowbone National Park.

programme.title: E522 - Pups Save A Windy Bay
programme.desc: A super-strong wind has suddenly swept up all the surfers in the Adventure Bay Windsurfing Race.

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already ''living in the future'!

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China's rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country's culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China's rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country's culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

E23 - Arcade Dance Off
programme.desc: Stumbling across an arcade, Sarah takes on a dancing challenge with John, whilst Duck and Flamingo team up to try and defeat a video game!

programme.title: E2 - The Moving Badge
programme.desc: Snail is thrilled to be moving house as she wishes to escape the wet and sploshy place she currently calls home to a more spacious house on the hill.

programme.title: E6 - Machu Picchu, Peru
programme.desc: A giant grimbot bounces down the valley of Machu Picchu. Can the Go Jetters stop him?

programme.title: E13 - Andy And The Baby European Pond Turtle
programme.desc: In this episode, Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to the Danube river in Vienna, Austria on a baby animal mission to help a newly hatched European pond turtle reach water. Along the way, the intrepid team witness the emergence of ten million mayflies.

programme.title: E25 - Sandy And Seaweed's Treasure Trove
programme.desc: Squawk takes us on a journey to find Sandy and Seaweed's top Swashbuckle moments.

programme.title: E1 - Dance Mode
programme.desc: After Dad eats her last chip, Bingo is given three chances to put Mum and Dad in 'Dance Mode' as payback. But the others can't resist taking Bingo's turns for her.

programme.title: E2 - Hammerbarn
programme.desc: On a trip to Hammerbarn, Bluey and Bingo create their own mini-homes side-by-side in the trolley. But Bluey quickly gets jealous of her neighbour, Bingo.

programme.title: E19 - The Laughter Badge
programme.desc: From sensible chuckles and nervous giggles to Duggee's infectious laughter, once everyone starts, it's so hard to stop. What were they laughing about again? Anyone remember?

programme.title: E84 - Musical Statues
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po enjoy a game of musical statues. It takes the Teletubbies a few turns to work out what to do when the music stops; they must stand very still.

programme.title: E23 - Arcade Dance Off
programme.desc: Stumbling across an arcade, Sarah takes on a dancing challenge with John, whilst Duck and Flamingo team up to try and defeat a video game!

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. programme.title: Top Chef S17E10 -Colossal Coliseum Kaiseki
programme.desc: With only six chefs remaining, the challenges get even more difficult, when pastry super-chef Sherry Yard awaits the All Stars for a dreaded dessert Quickfire, made even more impossible when chefs must endure a blindfolded taste test to pick their ingredients. Then Michelin-starred Chefs/Restaurateurs Niki and Carole Lidi-Nakayama demonstrate a traditional Japanese Kaiseki meal, the ultimate in simplicity, restraint and precision. The chefs must make this formidable dinner for not just these Kaiseki masters, but in celebration of the Tokyo games with Olympic medalists Diana Taurasi, Rai Benjamin, Nastia Liukin, Ibtihaj Muhammad, Christian Coleman, Kerri Walsh Jennings and NBC Olympic Primetime Host Mike Tirico. The gold medal meal takes place at the iconic Los Angeles Coliseum with Padma, Tom, Nilou Motamed and Niki & Carole Lidi-Nakayama at the judges table.

programme.title: Superman Returns
programme.desc: Superman returns after five years in space to find Lois engaged and Lex Luthor with a sinister plan that will endanger America.

programme.title: Stardust
programme.desc: A young man discovers the meaning of true love while battling princes, ghosts and an evil witch in a quest to protect the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: Ruby And The Well S2E1 -I Wish Things Could'Ve Turned Out Differently
programme.desc: Ruby struggles both to save the well and grant the wish of an enemy of the community.

programme.title: Top Chef Junior S2E10 -Food Truck Battle
programme.desc: A fan-favorite junior chef makes a triumphant return, just in time for the wildly popular Top Chef Junior Food Truck Battle! The 6 remaining chefs must divide into teams to whip up custom food truck concepts and imaginative menus all their own. But with only 24 hours to deliver the goods for a crowd of hungry diners, things take a left turn when unexpected weather sends the chefs into a spinout. Will they manage to stay on course or will their food truck dreams come to a screeching halt?

programme.title: Lego Jurassic Park: The Unofficial Retelling
programme.desc: The ever charming and now slightly older Chaos Mathematician Dr. Ian Malcolm retells the tale of what happened that dreadful night at Jurassic Park.

programme.title: Stardust
programme.desc: A young man discovers the meaning of true love while battling princes, ghosts and an evil witch in a quest to protect the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S2E14 -The Great Snipe Hunt
programme.desc: When Lumpus pulls a prank on the bean scouts, it completely backfires and he ends up at their mercy.

programme.title: Generator Rex S2E9 -Outpost
programme.desc: A vigilante group has been freeing EVOS from captivity. When Rex is sent to investigate, he discovers things work differently in the jungle.

programme.title: Generator Rex S2E10 -Haunted
programme.desc: To help Noah get closer to a girl, Rex constructs an elaborate haunted house with the hope of scaring her into his friend's arms.

The gold medal meal takes place at the iconic Los Angeles Coliseum with Padma, Tom, Nilou Motamed and Niki & Carole Lidi-Nakayama at the judges table.

programme.title: Happily Ever After: Fairy Tales For Every Child S1E8 -Rapunzel
programme.desc: Whoopi Goldberg really lets her hair down as Zenobia, the Hoodoo Diva, who keeps Rapunzel locked in a high tower in the bayou.

programme.title: Pan
programme.desc: An orphan is spirited away to a magical land, where he finds both fun and dangers, and discovers his destiny — to become the hero who will be known as Peter Pan.

programme.title: E4 - Checkflight
programme.desc: Buffalo Joe has been a captain on the daily sked for 34 years and his 70th birthday is next week. Joe might have to stop flying if he doesn’t pass his medical and that could spell the end of Buffalo. Before Joe leaves to undergo five days of medical tests at the Mayo Clinic in Phoenix, Arizona, he calls two rampies, Sam Storm and Jeff Tapper, into his office to greenlight their DC-3 checkflights. Both Jeff and Sam have slogged away for eight months waiting for this chance. But on flight day, Sam is sick to his stomach from eating bad eggs the night before. Sam is not about to let a bad egg beat him and he helps Jeff prep DC-3, LFR. Just before takeoff, nausea wins—Sam has no choice but to back out and there’s no telling when he’ll get another chance. Jeff, on the other hand, has to overcome the jitters that have haunted him ever since he was in a crash landing earlier in the year. Mikey, Rod and his family prepare to greet Joe with a birthday cake shaped like a DC-3. At the last minute

programme.title: Ngayon At Kailanman
programme.desc: Eva, a kind-hearted young woman, discovers she is the true heir to the wealthy Cortes family. As she fights for justice and her identity, she falls in love with Inno, a member of the same family. Their romance is tested by secrets, betrayal, and tragedy, all centered around a powerful family legacy.

programme.title: TV Theatre
programme.desc: Excellent TV Series

programme.title: Masters Of Cantonese Cuisine
programme.desc: Masters of Cantonese Cuisine is a documentary on Lingnan (Guangdong) delicacies culture, originally created by Shenzhen Satellite TV. This is a brief history of food belonging to the Greater Bay Area, a history of customs and culture that belongs exclusively to Guangdong. The program focus on the local Guangdong delicacies, and led by a “delicacy searcher”, walking through streets in search of local specialities, visiting masters of Cantonese cuisines, and sharing unique tasting commentaries. In the meantime, the reflection on delicacies would be brought back to live studio, and two observers who are proficient in Cantonese cuisine cultures will have chats on tasting. From a spoon and a drop, it will extend to the taste of life and origin of culture embedded in the delicacies.

programme.title: TV Theatre
programme.desc: Excellent TV Series

programme.title: Innovation In Sync, Pioneering The Front!
programme.desc: Innovation in Sync, Pioneering the Front! 'The Frontiers' is your direct link to innovation, powered by the Shenzhen Media Group's AI Lab and China's largest AI models. Get the lowdown on groundbreaking trends-it's all here, served fresh and hot. With our forward-thinking geniuses, every episode is a thrilling journey into the future that's closer than you might think! programme.title: Masters Of Cantonese Cuisine
programme.desc: Masters of Cantonese Cuisine is a documentary on Lingnan (Guangdong) delicacies culture, originally created by Shenzhen Satellite TV. This is a brief history of food belonging to the Greater Bay Area, a history of customs and culture that belongs exclusively to Guangdong. The program focus on the local Guangdong delicacies, and led by a “delicacy searcher”, walking through streets in search of local specialities, visiting masters of Cantonese cuisines, and sharing unique tasting commentaries. In the meantime, the reflection on delicacies would be brought back to live studio, and two observers who are proficient in Cantonese cuisine cultures will have chats on tasting. From a spoon and a drop, it will extend to the taste of life and origin of culture embedded in the delicacies.

programme.title: E1 - Welcome to the Tundra
programme.desc: Wake up post-hibernation with 7 ravenous bears as Stage 1 of the competition kicks off. Battle wolves with new mom BoldFace, see tiny Stomper vie for power and Blondie’s love, and stand back as grizzled vet Bernie brawls with clueless teen Casanova.

programme.title: E1 - Realm of the Bear
programme.desc: Join a mother brown bear as she struggles to find food for her two young cubs while teaching them essential skills for the harsh winter ahead. Then visit a pair of tiny lynx kittens as they begin to venture away from the safety of their den.

programme.title: E2 - Under Pressure
programme.desc: As food and water become scarce, Crystal, the fierce leader of the Ruins gang, sets her sights on rival Kati’s territory and its neighboring fruit trees. Watch as Crystal’s move and a raid by outside invaders lead to dire consequences for one troop.

programme.title: E3 - Risk and Reward
programme.desc: The drought is finally over, but traversing the forest for food is still a gamble. See some leaders take the risk, leaving home territories undefended to feast on a cicada boom. When they return, trespassers are ready for a fight.

programme.title: E4 - The Road to Independence
programme.desc: As the babies grow, new power struggles break out in each troop. Watch as every member, from fierce Queen Crystal to low-ranking Erica, jockeys for position. Meanwhile, the babies start to understand how allies and enemies will shape their future.

programme.title: E1 - Realm of the Bear
programme.desc: Join a mother brown bear as she struggles to find food for her two young cubs while teaching them essential skills for the harsh winter ahead. Then visit a pair of tiny lynx kittens as they begin to venture away from the safety of their den.

programme.title: E2 - Under Pressure
programme.desc: As food and water become scarce, Crystal, the fierce leader of the Ruins gang, sets her sights on rival Kati’s territory and its neighboring fruit trees. Watch as Crystal’s move and a raid by outside invaders lead to dire consequences for one troop.

programme.title: E3 - Risk and Reward
programme.desc: The drought is finally over, but traversing the forest for food is still a gamble. See some leaders take the risk, leaving home territories undefended to feast on a cicada boom. When they return, trespassers are ready for a fight.

programme.title: E4 - The Road to Independence
programme.desc: As the babies grow, new power struggles break out in each troop. Watch as every member, from fierce Queen Crystal to low-ranking Erica, jockeys for position. Meanwhile, the babies start to understand how allies and enemies will shape their future.

programme.title: E1 - Trapped at Low Tide
programme.desc: Descend into the tide pool, where a hermit crab house hunts, a baby catshark runs into strange neighbours, and an octopus terrorises prey. Watch seagulls and other creatures hunt on the surface as the heat rises and oxygen depletes in the pool.

programme.title: Kingdom of the Tide
programme.desc: Low tide exposes a band of shore called the intertidal zone. It’s a place of stunning extremes, attacked by hurricane force waves and exposed to baking heat. Creatures here have evolved in countless bizarre ways. Scientists explore this alien realm.

programme.title: E6 - Careful, There's Humans Up There!
programme.desc: Follow the southern team as they test new migration tech and tools that could reduce shark attacks in a popular snorkelling spot. Then catch and tag bull sharks with the northern team, who want to help local swimmers steer clear of birthing mothers.

programme.title: NHK News 7
programme.desc: NHK's core news program wrapping up the day's events in an easy to understand way.

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: Having taken control of the Kinai region, Nobunaga orders the Toyotomi brothers to pressure the merchants of Sakai, including Imai Soukyu (Wada Masato), into paying a levy of twenty thousand kan in arrow taxes, with Matsunaga Hisahide (Takenaka Naoto) acting as their intermediary. But the merchants prove formidable opponents. Meanwhile, the Miyoshi Triumvirate seize on Nobunaga's absence and launch an attack on Honkoku-ji Temple in Kyoto, where the newly appointed shogun Ashikaga Yoshiaki resides.

programme.desc: The latest up-to-date news and nationwide weather information.

programme.title: E121
programme.desc: The 113th Drama Serial, inspired by the lives of Koizumi Setsu and Lafcadio Hearn also known as Koizumi Yakumo, portrays those who were left behind in the rapidly Westernizing Meiji era. At its heart is a woman captivated by ghost stories and her foreign-born husband. Together, they share a life that seems ordinary yet delightfully odd.

programme.title: Part 2
programme.desc: An actor Rokkaku Seiji, who loves both train and liquor, travels around Japan by rail. He stops over at stations he likes and explores the streets. Enjoy the fun-filled railroad trip with the music he selects!

programme.title: Natsui Itsuki's Haiku Trip! 'Sendai, Miyagi'
programme.desc: Haiku poet Natsui Itsuki sets “Haiku Post” across Japan, and receives “your piece of Haiku”! She selects unique works from among them, and invites the authors of those haiku to share their intentions, memories, and life stories. ROLAND, the King of the Hosts, accompanies her as a partner on the trip.

programme.desc: When a truckload of animals escapes, Yoko uses her magic to turn the situation into a full-on cowboy and cowgirl adventure!

programme.title: And the Winner Is
programme.desc: The Junior Vets have spent four weeks at Vet School, and it's time to go home. Now they all have a chance to do one last check-up on their grateful patients and say goodbye. But which one of the kids has impressed Paul enough to take the title of Head Vet?

programme.title: Secret Code
programme.desc: Eric learns that computer coding means writing programmes that tell robots and computers how to do certain jobs. Just as we use language to communicate with other people, there are lots of different programming or 'coding' languages to talk to computers.

programme.title: Nature's Classroom
programme.desc: In this week's episode Philippe heads to Key Largo to join a high school class getting up close with local sea grass habitats. He later travels to the streams of Pennsylvania to go on a 'Bio-Blitz' surveying aquatic insects.

programme.title: The Mysterious Bleeps and Bloops
programme.desc: When a highly advanced computer is loaned to Ayrton Park Public School, mysterious cyber events begin happening around town and Addison wonders if the occurrences could be part of a world-wide-web... of mystery!

programme.title: Old Jeans
programme.desc: Wondering what to do with that old pair of jeans? Hepi and Briko have an excellent idea.

programme.title: Fantastic Earth Fables
programme.desc: Bumble tells stories about life on Earth, but because she's never been there, she starts to tell big fat lies. Therefore, Sprinter and Leo must help her tell stories that are funny, exciting, and not the least true.

programme.title: Song of the Sea Witch
programme.desc: Rose wants to learn to sing, because all of the great fairy tale princess could sing. Things get tricky when the Sea Witch steals Rose's voice! Rose has to sing in front of the whole school, as Hawk and the others fight to get her voice back in time for her debut!

programme.title: Vikings
programme.desc: Like Raven and Little Lewis, the famous giants of the northern mists, the Vikings, are master looters and navigators. Besides being bloody warriors and shrewd negotiators, the Vikings are also great explorers, out to discover the world.

programme.title: Lord and Peasant
programme.desc: Our humble peasant friend Howler can't wait for his next batch of pretzels! However, in the Middle Ages, the feudal system is ruthless, the lord always helping himself to a share of the peasant's yield. And, quite often, all that's left is a few meager crumbs!

programme.title: Oto-nardo Da Vinci
programme.desc: Oto is trying to build a working model of a tank, from designs by Leonardo Da Vinci. But the tank won't roll! He followed the plans exactly, so why won't Oto's tank work? Anabella suggests they ask a friend of hers for help, so they visit Florence, Italy.

programme.title: Nature's Classroom

programme.title: The Lockdown Showdown
programme.desc: Acro gymnasts Dylan and Nyree have come up with a special lockdown competition, and all the Gym Stars are getting involved.

programme.desc: Tensions run high when Lincoln and Clyde both get an internship at Flip's and compete to win the manager title. // When Lincoln sees how tame Pop Pop has gotten in his older age, he takes him out for a day to remember.

programme.title: E204 - Suite and Sour / Back in Black
programme.desc: After Mom and Dad win a trip to a resort, they decide to take the kids - but only because they promised to behave. // When Lucy gets a crush on a 'regular and normal' boy, her sisters give her a makeover.

programme.title: E209 - SpongeBob's Place / Plankton Gets the Boot
programme.desc: When SpongeBob cooks at home, Mr. Krabs' customers leave his restaurant and head for SpongeBob's Place. // When Plankton gets kicked out of the house, it's up to SpongeBob to teach him how to win his computer wife back.

programme.title: E213 - The Getaway / Lost and Found
programme.desc: When SpongeBob mistakes an escaped convict for his driving instructor, it's the new teacher who learns a lesson. // When Krabs sends him searching for a missing toy, SpongeBob finds himself lost... in the lost & found!

programme.title: E518 - Love Bytes
programme.desc: Things get a little buggy when Schwoz installs a new operating system on the Man Cave Computer designed to detect and eliminate threats all over Swellview.

programme.title: E214 - Patrick's Coupon / Out of the Picture
programme.desc: Patrick has a coupon for free ice cream, but he'll have to get to the store if he wants to use it! // Krabs buys Squidward's art, but to make a profit on his purchase he'll have to get the artist out of the picture!

programme.title: E101 - Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: E203 - J-LAD
programme.desc: LAD has a sleepover and in an effort to join in, Jack ends up making a promise that turns their night upside down.

programme.title: E320 - Bizarro Bottom / Squidward's Tough Break
programme.desc: SpongeBob falls asleep on the bus and ends up in a strange town full of Bikini Bottom doppelgangers. // After Squidward loses his memory, he adopts a new tough guy persona.

programme.title: E101 - Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase

programme.title: E108 - LAD / Before 10AM
programme.desc: Determined to learn the truth about Jack's secret morning life, Lily does the unthinkable and wakes up early. But her sleuthing gets them both in big trouble. // Lil and her BFFs Anusha & Debs fight to win the coveted trophy at Hank N Beans arcade.

programme.title: E508 - iLost My Head In Vegas
programme.desc: When Sam learns her mom is in a Vegas jail, the gang decides to gather their most prized possessions, drive to Vegas and pawn their stuff to make enough money to bail her out.

programme.desc: SpongeBob breaks his precious alarm clock, but nothing else is loud enough to wake him up on time. // Karen quickly learns that kids grow up too fast after her new child arrives in the mail.

programme.title: E317
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the '2 Days and 1 Night' casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: Crime Story
programme.desc: Eddie Chan, a guilt-ridden cop trying to silence his demons from a recent shoot-out who is assigned to rescue kidnapped businessman Huang Yifei. It is a trail that leads Chan and his partner, Hung from Hong Kong to Taipei and back to Hong Kong. As the trail gets warmer, Chan begins to suspect that there are internal forces – including Hung – who seem to working against him...

programme.title: Doctor Vampire
programme.desc: Dr. Chiang, a Hong Kong surgeon, finds himself surrounded by beautiful girls in an old castle. Little does he realize these are the Count's vampire girls. He has a one-night stand with Alice who bites him while he was unaware. He gradually assumes the characteristics of a vampire. Alice breaks with the Count and goes to Hong Kong to save Dr. Chiang. That gets him into hot water with his girlfriend May...

E23 - Beautiful Loft In Brussels

programme.title: E1 - Dumplings And Other Stuffed Pastas
programme.desc: With Myriam Fehmiu, Anita Feng, Jason Kacprzak, and Jens Ruoff, Christian embarks on a world tour of stuffed pastas. Vegetarian dumplings, maultaschen, pierogi... the chefs share all their tips and tricks for high-level preparation.

programme.title: E80
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: E65
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E16 - In Chinon (1)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Chinon, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she focuses on the history of the region and its traditional vegetables.

programme.title: E1 - Game Day Goofs & Grandma's Fixes!
programme.desc: Get ready for game day goofs & Grandma's amazing fixes! The fun starts with a basketball game, but when Max the Monster Truck tries a slam dunk, he breaks his suspension & gets a teddy bear stuck in the hoop! Then, when Gecko gets a boo boo while trying to fix Bobby the Bus's mixed-up controls, Grandma Gecko arrives just in time to help with the repair. The day ends with Grandma's own goof, as she starts sleepwalking during a sleepover!

programme.title: E2 - The Whole Crew to the Rescue!
programme.desc: It's the whole crew to the rescue in these amazing adventures! When Kat doesn't know a car's throttle is stuck, she goes for a test drive & is soon out of control, forcing Grandma & Gecko to rescue her! Then, when a beach trip is cancelled because Tilly the Tow Truck breaks down, Trevor helps with a tow & then delivers a load of sand to create a surprise beach right at the garage! Plus, the whole crew jumps into action when Blue gets stranded alone down a steep bank.

programme.title: E1 - Game Day Goofs & Grandma's Fixes!
programme.desc: Get ready for game day goofs & Grandma's amazing fixes! The fun starts with a basketball game, but when Max the Monster Truck tries a slam dunk, he breaks his suspension & gets a teddy bear stuck in the hoop! Then, when Gecko gets a boo boo while trying to fix Bobby the Bus's mixed-up controls, Grandma Gecko arrives just in time to help with the repair. The day ends with Grandma's own goof, as she starts sleepwalking during a sleepover!

programme.title: E1 - Siblings Month: Outdoor Adventures!
programme.desc: Join JJ & his siblings for outdoor adventures! First, JJ wants to race his pedal coupe like his siblings race their monster trucks! Then, cool off on a hot summer day with a homemade water park in the backyard. The outdoor fun continues as they search for sea creatures by the bay, dance with ants & ladybugs in the garden & have a silly time with a magical Bananaphone that makes everyone dance!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Special Day with Jill!
programme.desc: Join Jill for a super special day of friendship & discovery! First, she's at the playground with her friends when she notices a new girl is there all alone. Jill takes it upon herself to make friends with the girl & make her feel welcome. Then, while all of her friends know what their 'thing' is, Jill is unsure. She tries playing sports & dancing, but none of them stick. Eventually, she discovers that she's really good at arts & crafts & makes friendship bracelets for everyone!

programme.title: E1 - Join JJ's Fun Learning Club!
programme.desc: Come on & join JJ's fun learning club! The adventure starts with a field trip to the farm where JJ & his friends learn to count to ten using apples. The learning continues in the classroom as Ms. Appleberry sends the kids on a scavenger hunt to find items in every color of the rainbow. Even lunchtime is fun, as the family finds all the different shapes in JJ's lunch! From taking care of pets to learning yoga, there's always something new to learn!

programme.title: E1 - When Buster Becomes a Superhero!
programme.desc: Watch as Buster becomes a real-life superhero! When a storm starts during a nature walk, everyone panics, but it's up to brave Buster to lead them all safely home through the rain & wind. Then, Buster wants to be an emergency vehicle. He gets his chance to be a hero when he's guarding the fire station & a fire breaks out! It's up to Buster the hero fire truck to save the day. From flying like Super Buster to rescuing a kitten, he's always a hero!

programme.title: E1 - The Ultimate Rescue Missions!
programme.desc: Join Gecko for some of his ultimate rescue missions! Blue must face his fear of a storm to save Eric the Excavator, who is stuck in a trench with a dam about to overflow! Then, Weasel fits Vicky the Ice Cream truck with a super-fast rocket, causing her to speed out of control! Gecko & the Mechanicals must stop her before she crashes. From saving a trapped Mummy Truck to rescuing the Mechs, it's always a big adventure!

programme.title: E1 - Siblings Month: Outdoor Adventures!
programme.desc: Join JJ & his siblings for outdoor adventures! First, JJ wants to race his pedal coupe like his siblings race their monster trucks! Then, cool off on a hot summer day with a homemade water park in the backyard. The outdoor fun continues as they search for sea creatures by the bay, dance with ants & ladybugs in the garden & have a silly time with a magical Bananaphone that makes everyone dance!

programme.title: E1 - The Ultimate Rescue Missions!
programme.desc: Join Gecko for some of his ultimate rescue missions! Blue must face his fear of a storm to save Eric the Excavator, who is stuck in a trench with a dam about to overflow! Then, Weasel fits Vicky the Ice Cream truck with a super-fast rocket, causing her to speed out of control! Gecko & the Mechanicals must stop her before she crashes. From saving a trapped Mummy Truck to rescuing the Mechs, it's always a big adventure!

programme.title: E2 - Let's All Help Each Other!
programme.desc: It's a day of helping each other at Lellobee City Farm! When a mama songbird's eggs are about to hatch, Mei, Ella & Rishi build her a beautiful bird feeding table so she can take care of her new chicks. Then, when Heidi the Horse is feeling down in the dumps, Ella & all the friends put on a show & give her a big group hug to make her feel happy again! The helping continues as everyone learns the importance of sharing their veggies with a visiting gopher.

programme.title: E4 - Fun Facts About The World!
programme.desc: Blippi is learning fun facts all about the world! He & D.BO shrink down to meet Ernie the Eraser, an aspiring magician who teaches them the science behind how erasers work. Then, they fly into the night sky to learn how fireworks get their colors & why some animals, like raccoons, prefer to come out at night. The adventure continues as Blippi learns how to be a cowboy in the desert & helps a brave spoon protect his cereal from getting soggy!

programme.title: E2 - Little Problems, Big Adventures!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle are turning little problems into big adventures! When Mr. Vanderboos accidentally sprays hair growth serum on Daddy, Officer Freeze mistakes him for a hairy monster, & a wild chase begins! Then, Mila has a bad cold, but she still has to help Morphle figure out the right morphs to rescue a dog stuck in a tree. From playing a quiet game to avoid waking a napping neighbor to playing hide & seek with friends, every little problem is a big adventure!

programme.title: E1 - The Ultimate Rescue Missions!
programme.desc: Join Gecko for some of his ultimate rescue missions! Blue must face his fear of a storm to save Eric the Excavator, who is stuck in a trench with a dam about to overflow! Then, Weasel fits Vicky the Ice Cream truck with a super-fast rocket, causing her to speed out of control! Gecko & the Mechanicals must stop her before she crashes. From saving a trapped Mummy Truck to rescuing the Mechs, it's always a big adventure!

programme.title: E1 - When Buster Becomes a Superhero!
programme.desc: Watch as Buster becomes a real-life superhero! When a storm starts during a nature walk, everyone panics, but it's up to brave Buster to lead them all safely home through the rain & wind. Then, Buster wants to be an emergency vehicle. He gets his chance to be a hero when he's guarding the fire station & a fire breaks out! It's up to Buster the hero fire truck to save the day. From flying like Super Buster to rescuing a kitten, he's always a hero!

programme.title: E2 - The Whole Crew to the Rescue!
programme.desc: It's the whole crew to the rescue in these amazing adventures! When Kat doesn't know a car's throttle is stuck, she goes for a test drive & is soon out of control, forcing Grandma & Gecko to rescue her! Then, when a beach trip is cancelled because Tilly the Tow Truck breaks down, Trevor helps with a tow & then delivers a load of sand to create a surprise beach right at the garage! Plus, the whole crew jumps into action when Blue gets stranded alone down a steep bank.

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Day on the Farm!
programme.desc: Join Ella for a super fun day at Lellobee City Farm! First, when a nest of baby duck eggs starts to hatch, Ella has to play 'Mummy Duck' to keep all the cute but runaway ducklings together! Then, Rishi organizes all the animals for a friendly game of soccer, where everyone learns each other's animal sounds. The fun day ends with a new arrival, as Ella & Mei find & adopt a stray cat named Bingo, welcoming him to his new home!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Special Day with Jill!
programme.desc: Join Jill for a super special day of friendship & discovery! First, she's at the playground with her friends when she notices a new girl is there all alone. Jill takes it upon herself to make friends with the girl & make her feel welcome. Then, while all of her friends know what their 'thing' is, Jill is unsure. She tries playing sports & dancing, but none of them stick. Eventually, she discovers that she's really good at arts & crafts & makes friendship bracelets for everyone!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Day on the Farm!
programme.desc: Join Ella for a super fun day at Lellobee City Farm! First, when a nest of baby duck eggs starts to hatch, Ella has to play 'Mummy Duck' to keep all the cute but runaway ducklings together! Then, Rishi organizes all the animals for a friendly game of soccer, where everyone learns each other's animal sounds. The fun day ends with a new arrival, as Ella & Mei find & adopt a stray cat named Bingo, welcoming him to his new home!

programme.title: E1 - Join JJ's Fun Learning Club!
programme.desc: Come on & join JJ's fun learning club! The adventure starts with a field trip to the farm where JJ & his friends learn to count to ten using apples. The learning continues in the classroom as Ms. Appleberry sends the kids on a scavenger hunt to find items in every color of the rainbow. Even lunchtime is fun, as the family finds all the different shapes in JJ's lunch! From taking care of pets to learning yoga, there's always something new to learn!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Special Day with Jill!
programme.desc: Join Jill for a super special day of friendship & discovery! First, she's at the playground with her friends when she notices a new girl is there all alone. Jill takes it upon herself to make friends with the girl & make her feel welcome. Then, while all of her friends know what their 'thing' is, Jill is unsure. She tries playing sports & dancing, but none of them stick. Eventually, she discovers that she's really good at arts & crafts & makes friendship bracelets for everyone!

programme.title: E2 - Let's All Help Each Other!
programme.desc: It's a day of helping each other at Lellobee City Farm! When a mama songbird's eggs are about to hatch, Mei, Ella & Rishi build her a beautiful bird feeding table so she can take care of her new chicks. Then, when Heidi the Horse is feeling down in the dumps, Ella & all the friends put on a show & give her a big group hug to make her feel happy again! The helping continues as everyone learns the importance of sharing their veggies with a visiting gopher.

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Day on the Farm!

programme.title: E1 - Siblings Month: Outdoor Adventures!
programme.desc: Join JJ & his siblings for outdoor adventures! First, JJ wants to race his pedal coupe like his siblings race their monster trucks! Then, cool off on a hot summer day with a homemade water park in the backyard. The outdoor fun continues as they search for sea creatures by the bay, dance with ants & ladybugs in the garden & have a silly time with a magical Bananaphone that makes everyone dance!

programme.title: E1 - Game Day Goofs & Grandma's Fixes!
programme.desc: Get ready for game day goofs & Grandma's amazing fixes! The fun starts with a basketball game, but when Max the Monster Truck tries a slam dunk, he breaks his suspension & gets a teddy bear stuck in the hoop! Then, when Gecko gets a boo boo while trying to fix Bobby the Bus's mixed-up controls, Grandma Gecko arrives just in time to help with the repair. The day ends with Grandma's own goof, as she starts sleepwalking during a sleepover!

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 謝盈萱等原班人馬回歸出演，天心加盟飾演新角色。 40歲的陳嘉玲從天龍國回到家鄉台南，展開人生下半場。第一件要努力的事就是靠自己的雙手，把買下的鬼屋變成家。但一開始就發生一連串意外，摔傷、被蜜蜂叮，還坐輪椅進了醫院……新的一季看陳嘉玲如何用盡全力，開始書寫另一段人生篇章。

programme.title: E11 - Aftermath
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. programme.title: Blind Youth In Delhi Use Acroyoga To Overcome Exclusion
programme.desc: In Delhi, visually impaired youth deal with exclusion and fear in a chaotic city. But through acroyoga, they build trust and confidence, defying disability and societal neglect. Yoga helps them connect with their bodies and reclaim visibility in a world that often overlooks them.

programme.title: Could You Endure These Rites Of Passage?
programme.desc: Across Africa, coming of age can mean dangerous rites of passage. We meet boys facing deadly initiations, girls rejecting FGM, and Miss World Somalia who is turning her pain into purpose.

programme.title: Is Zimbabwe's Mnangagwa Eyeing A Third Term?
programme.desc: A controversial constitutional amendment is shaking Zimbabwe to its core. Tensions are rising - and turning dangerous. Critics like Prof. Madhuku narrowly survived an attack at a political meeting, calling it a chilling sign that the country's democracy may be at its lowest point in years.

programme.title: E8 - When Push Comes To Shove
programme.desc: When Toni meets Harold at a medical convention, they click and soon marry. But when money starts going missing from Toni's account, suspicion falls on Harold.

programme.title: E9 - The Telltale Creek
programme.desc: People in charming Hope Mills, are on edge when a high school freshman vanishes while on her way to meet a friend. When she turns up dead three weeks later, the community rallies to flush out the killer.

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: A longstanding feud comes to a head when two neighbours confront each other with guns; a school bus driver goes on a dangerous high-speed chase to outrun an irate parent who attacks her bus with a hammer.

programme.title: E2 - Murdered My Boss Or Innocent Employee?
programme.desc: After a construction company boss is found shot dead, no arrests are made. An employee says he'd been bound and gagged by a gang just before the shooting. But 14 years later police charge him with murder.

programme.title: Virus
programme.desc: The world is under attack from an “Love virus”? Taek-seon is a translator who always feels tired, unmotivated and uninterested in romance. One day, Taek-seon has a disastrous blind date with Su-pil, a born single medical researcher who proposes on their first meeting. After the date they met, the world is suddenly enveloped in atmosphere of love... Taek-seon found herself laughing for no reason and searching for a beautiful dress, everything looks cute, even a daily promotional text from her old classmate Yeon-woo. However, Taek-seon knew that she had been infected with 100% fatality rate deadly virus -- Toxo Virus. She meets Dr. Lee Gyun, the only researcher who can create the antiviral medicine and she realizes that all these romantic feelings are symptoms of virus. Thus, her unexpected journey begins...

programme.title: Keep Chasing: The Beast Stalker
programme.desc: A traffic accident changed their lives forever. In capturing wanted criminal Zhang Yidong, Sergeant Tang Fei was involved in a gunfight and car accident that put the criminal in a coma. But in the process he also crippled an fellow officer, and mistakenly shot dead the elder daughter of public prosecutor and single mother Gao Min. Unable to handle the guilt, Tang Fei succumbs to a fog of pain. Gao Min, meanwhile, pours all her love and attention to her younger daughter Ling. Three months later, the criminal Zhang Yidong awakens from his coma. Gao Min, who had been working hard on bringing him to justice, insists he stand trial immediately.

programme.title: Wandering
programme.desc: In a park on a rainy evening, a 19-year-old university student, Fumi, offers an umbrella to a soaking wet 10-year-old girl, Sarasa. Realizing her reluctance to go home, Fumi lets her stay in his place, where she spends the next two months in peace. They take each other's hands and seem to have finally found their place in the world until Fumi is arrested for kidnapping. Fifteen years later, the lonely two are reunited both still suffering from the stigma as the victim and perpetrator of “a pedophile case”. Will the society give a place to their unshakable bond they have formed.

programme.title: Nocturnal
programme.desc: One day, the dead body of Min-tae only brother Seok-tae was found, and Seok-tae ‘s wife Moon-young has disappeared. While searching for clues on this brother's death, Min-tae found that a novelist Ho-ryung also following the same trail and he discovered that the death of his brother was predicted in Ho-ryung's bestselling novel, ‘Nocturnal.' Min-tae was thrown into confusion and brother's gang and police also getting involved in the case. To find out the truth behind brother's death, Min-tae began a relentless and furious pursuit...

Le Grand Jt Des Territoires:2026
programme.desc: Up-to-date news from the French regions presented by Cyril Viguier.

programme.title: E14 - Rakesh Jain (India)
programme.desc: Former professional wrestler, Rakesh Jain arrives in France with a special sports visa. Seduced by Paris and French culture, he quickly learns the language and becomes a yoga trainer in prestigious centers. An opportunity to illustrate the inspiring fusion of French and Indian cultures.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil S7
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: E7 - From Bordeaux To The Gers Countryside
programme.desc: Anne-Catherine Verwaerde dives into Bordeaux elegance and discovers Gers authenticity.

programme.title: E39 - Lose Your Loaf
programme.desc: 52 before JC. The city of Lutecia is occupied by the Romans... Completely? No! A gang of invincible animals led by Idefix resist the invader again and again and its plans to romanise the city.

programme.title: E7 - As Clean As Clean Can Be
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

E8
programme.desc: 故事描繪一位除了愛什麼都不懂的笨拙綁匪與一位不懂愛的天才少女，性格迥異的命運共同體“父女”，展開一段獨特的逃亡旅程。主角新庄政宗（齋藤工）為了籌措患有心臟病女兒的手術費，在妻子的提議下，決定綁架富有的醫院院長之女七瀬凛（永尾柚乃）。新庄一直猶豫不決，但在妻子不斷策動下，他終於開車來到院長宅邸附近時，一名女孩突然衝到他的車前。千鈞一髮之際，避免了事故。當凛醒來時，卻發現她失去記憶。新庄情急之下謊稱自己是她的爸爸，從此被迫開始扮演“父親”的角色。而凛的父母已被某個神秘人物殺害，新庄也因此成為殺人嫌疑犯。然而他所綁架的凛，竟是一位能操多國語言、博學多聞、思維敏捷的天才少女。從這一刻起，原本居於主導地位的新庄反而成了凛的依靠，開始向她尋求擺脫困境的建議，兩人的關係也因此徹底逆轉。除了警方外，新庄與凛還遭到來歷不明、意圖不明的男子追擊。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 故事描繪一位除了愛什麼都不懂的笨拙綁匪與一位不懂愛的天才少女，性格迥異的命運共同體“父女”，展開一段獨特的逃亡旅程。主角新庄政宗（齋藤工）為了籌措患有心臟病女兒的手術費，在妻子的提議下，決定綁架富有的醫院院長之女七瀬凛（永尾柚乃）。新庄一直猶豫不決，但在妻子不斷策動下，他終於開車來到院長宅邸附近時，一名女孩突然衝到他的車前。千鈞一髮之際，避免了事故。當凛醒來時，卻發現她失去記憶。新庄情急之下謊稱自己是她的爸爸，從此被迫開始扮演“父親”的角色。而凛的父母已被某個神秘人物殺害，新庄也因此成為殺人嫌疑犯。然而他所綁架的凛，竟是一位能操多國語言、博學多聞、思維敏捷的天才少女。從這一刻起，原本居於主導地位的新庄反而成了凛的依靠，開始向她尋求擺脫困境的建議，兩人的關係也因此徹底逆轉。除了警方外，新庄與凛還遭到來歷不明、意圖不明的男子追擊。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 多海是魔論製菓公司疲憊不堪的營銷團隊經理，她不知道自己還能忍受這種看似毫無希望的生活多久。就在這時，一心追求經濟利益的銷售部恩尚向她提出了投資加密貨幣的大膽建議。在經歷了無數次失敗後，加密貨幣成了恩尚最後的救命稻草，也是她扭轉人生的一線希望。會計部智松把花錢等同於幸福，出於害怕被拋在後面，她衝動地加入了他們。這場賭博很快變成了加密貨幣市場跌宕起伏的過山車之旅。當放棄歌唱事業、冉冉升起的公司董事咸志宇加入他們時，不可預測的混亂局面只會加深。這三個普通工人能否中大獎，一路飛向月球？

programme.title: E2 - Secretariat Of Cake
programme.desc: The Mother's Day rush is one of the busiest times of the year, and Buddy is stressed! He needs to create a custom cake for the 50th Anniversary of Secretariat's Triple Crown win.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: E4 - Chicken Gizzard And Poutine
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece makes a smothered chicken gizzard poutine, which mixes traditional, Southern-fried chicken gizzards with French-Canadian fries, gravy and cheese curds for a decadent global meal.

programme.title: E9 - 新男嘉賓登場
programme.desc: 首檔郵輪戀愛真人show，六位單身男女乘坐郵輪共同旅行，通過共同相處打開心結，收穫真愛。孟非、黃菡、張純燁、郭京飛、朱正廷、程瀟等明星嘉賓組成觀察團，觀察各位單身男女在日常生活中的細節和情感走向，進行推理分析。

programme.title: E6 - 楊潤澤淘汰危機蘇有朋捏把汗
programme.desc: 突破傳統音樂綜藝節目模式，創新性地將舞台設立在郵輪上，從中國上海啟航，途經沖繩、越南、新加坡、馬來西亞，最終抵達香港；吸納數百名來自亞洲各國的00後新銳唱將，他們將在Jessie J、張靚穎、張信哲、尤長靖所組成的「新聲團」，及近百位亞洲各國音樂人的見證下，開啟一次巡迴亞洲的音樂競演！
